stemHtml:
For a single engine aeroplane, calculate the net glide distance following an engine failure. Given:

Altitude: 9500 ft
Terrain elevation: 500 ft
Gross gradient: 11%
TAS: 250 kt
Headwind: 42 kt

Still Air Distance = (Height Difference (ft) x 100) / Net Gradient (%)
Ground Distance = Still Air Distance x (GS/TAS)
